hero.title: Cela iphrojekthi yokufinyeleleka
hero.lead: I-IATF ibukeza izicelo zamaphrojekthi okufinyeleleka aqala ngesidingo sangempela.
support: Awudingi imininingwane ephelele. Inkinga ecacile, ukuthi ithinta bani, nokuthi kungani ibalulekile yanele ukuba uqale.

items.label: Iwebhusayithi
items.body: Sebenzisa ifomu elingezansi ukuze uthumele isicelo esihlelekile.

items.label: I-imeyili
items.body: Thumela isicelo ngqo ku {{contact.requestsEmail}}Izicelo ze-imeyili zingaba amarekhodi ezicelo zomphakathi ngemuva kokubuyekezwa nokuhlelwa.

items.label: Ukungezwani
items.body: Qala lapho uma lokho kulula. Isicelo sisadlulela ekubuyekezweni okufanayo.

guidance.title: Ngaphambi kokuthi uthumele isicelo
paragraphs: IATF isebenza esidlangalaleni. Izicelo zingafingqwa futhi zishicilelwe njengamarekhodi ezicelo zomphakathi enhlanganweni ye-IATF GitHub, kule webhusayithi, noma zombili.

Ungafaki amakheli angasese, izinombolo zocingo, imininingwane yezokwelapha, noma imininingwane yokuhlonza abasebenzisi ngabanye bobuchwepheshe bokusiza ngaphandle uma kudingekile futhi ukhululekile ukuba i-IATF ibuyekeze.
I-IATF isusa imininingwane yokuxhumana yomuntu siqu engadingekile ngaphambi kokushicilela amarekhodi ezicelo.

review.title: Ukubukeza okulindelwe
paragraphs: I-IATF ibukeza izicelo zokufaneleka komsebenzi, ukwenzeka, usizo, nokuthi umsebenzi ungena yini endaweni yokugcina yomphakathi.
Ezinye izicelo zingase zenqatshwe, zihlehliswe noma zishintshwe ngaphambi kokuba zamukelwe.

fields.name: Imininingwane Yokuxhumana
fields.label: Imininingwane yokuxhumana
fields.helper: Ikheli le-imeyili noma i-Discord handle yokulandelela.

fields.name: extra Umongo
fields.label: Umongo owengeziwe
fields.helper: Yabelana nganoma yini enye engasiza ekuchazeni isidingo: kungani kubalulekile, izibonelo, izinkomba, umqondo wesofthiwe ongahluziwe, noma imikhawulo yesikhathi.

fields.name: openSourceConsent (Imvume Yomthombo Ovulekile)
fields.label: Ingabe uzizwa ukhululekile ngokuthuthukiswa komthombo ovulekile?
fields.helper: Amaphrojekthi amukelwe ayizinqolobane zomphakathi ngaphansi kwe-IATF.

items: indawo yokugcina yomphakathi enhlanganweni ye-IATF GitHub

paragraphs: Uma unesidingo sangempela sokufinyeleleka futhi ucabanga ukuthi kufanele kube iphrojekthi yomphakathi, thumela kithi.
